import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.load_workbook\('C:/Users/jackm/Projects/Spending-Power-Tool/spending power tool.xlsx', data_only=True\)
print\('Sheet names:', wb.sheetnames\)
for sheet_name in wb.sheetnames:
    ws = wb[sheet_name]
    print\(f'\\n=== Sheet: {sheet_name} ==='\)
    print\(f'Dimensions: {ws.dimensions}'\)
    print\(f'Max row: {ws.max_row}, Max col: {ws.max_column}'\)
    print\(\)
    for row in ws.iter_rows\(min_row=1, max_row=ws.max_row, max_col=ws.max_column, values_only=False\):
        row_data = []
        for cell in row:
            if cell.value is not None:
                row_data.append\(f'{cell.coordinate}={cell.value}'\)
        if row_data:
            print\(' | '.join\(row_data\)\)
")

Bash(/c/Users/jackm/AppData/Local/Microsoft/WindowsApps/python -c "
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import os

base = 'C:/Users/jackm/Projects/Spending-Power-Tool/public'

for size in [192, 512]:
    img = Image.new\('RGB', \(size, size\), '#2563eb'\)
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw\(img\)
    font_size = size // 3
    try:
        font = ImageFont.truetype\('arial.ttf', font_size\)
    except:
        font = ImageFont.load_default\(\)
    text = 'SP'
    bbox = draw.textbbox\(\(0, 0\), text, font=font\)
    tw, th = bbox[2] - bbox[0], bbox[3] - bbox[1]
    x = \(size - tw\) / 2 - bbox[0]
    y = \(size - th\) / 2 - bbox[1]
    draw.text\(\(x, y\), text, fill='white', font=font\)
    img.save\(os.path.join\(base, f'icon-{size}.png'\)\)
    print\(f'Created icon-{size}.png'\)
")
